name_cn:
DAUPHINE SOFT Large Handbag #️⃣M47149
Exclusive global launch! This style is custom-made according to Chanel's French production specifications with dynamic chip changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website's latest full gift box!
28 x 20 x 11 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal pieces
Zippered interior pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 29.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 52.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 26.0 cm
Made in France
